request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that foreign tech companies are now handling 68% of our critical infrastructure data? This isn't just about privacy—it's about national security. When we rely on foreign entities for our most sensitive systems, we're putting our country at risk. Strategic autonomy isn't just a buzzword; it's our duty to ensure that our security isn't in the hands of those who might not have our best interests at heart. #SecureOurFuture #StrategicAutonomy
